particulars.description: All and whole the subjects being the sub-station ground at old ford road and palmerston road, aberdeen registered in land register of scotland title number ABN109152; all and whole the subjects being the ground and building forming pilgrim house at old ford road, aberdeen, registered title number ABN98978.

All estates and interests of the company in freehold, leasehold property and other immovable property (wherever situate), now or at any time hereafter during the continuance of this security belonging to or charged to the company and the proceeds of sale thereof, together with all buildings, structures and fixtures (including trade and tenant's fixtures) from time to time on or in any such property (other than any property charged in terms of clause 2.1.1);. the benefit of all its rights, present and future, under covenants for title given in relation to the property and the benefit of all its rights, present and future, against any lessee, sub-lessee, licensee or other occupier of the property for the time being (including rights to rental income, licence fees, mesne profits and other income) and, in each case, its rights against guarantors and sureties for the obligations of such persons; and. All patents, trade and service marks, brand and trade names, copyrights, design rights, registered designs, trade secrets, know-how, inventions, confidential information and other intellectual property rights, including the benefit of any pending applications for any of them, now or at any time during the continuance of this security belonging to the company, including all the company's rights under any agreements both present or future, relating to the use or exploitation of such rights.
